description.value:
Skill Path: Remedies (Medicine)

You are especially adept at crafting alchemical and magical healing potions.

While developing your skills in Medicine you chose to focus specifically on Remedies (Medicine), learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.NMbOfl885pn0Yzu9]{Prepare Elemental Medicine}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-skillpaths.pf2e-skillpath-compendium.Item.Y4oyRkx6D8HrCTih]{Craft Remedies}.

This path focuses on Prepare Elemental Medicine.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.NMbOfl885pn0Yzu9]{Prepare Elemental Medicine}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-skillpaths.pf2e-skillpath-compendium.Item.Y4oyRkx6D8HrCTih]{Craft Remedies}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.EmIV9haKFrBRB43E]{Pei Zing Adept}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-skillpaths.pf2e-skillpath-compendium.Item.7ROt6RmzC1mWDvRH]{Residual Remedy}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.zzd2KYAqY1Ez6aBD]{Temperature Adjustment}
  • Legendary: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Kk4AMZtpQnLEgN0b]{Legendary Medic}
